summary: Reduce datastore contention by migrating two high-I/O VMs after validating storage and application constraints.
alternatives: Move one VM to alternate datastore
preconditions: Confirm alternate datastore capacity and latency
backup_snapshot_guidance: Do not create a new snapshot solely for this migration
Confirm recent application-consistent backup for the database VM
steps: Migrate second VM if threshold remains exceeded
rollback: Migrate VM back to original datastore if application or storage checks fail
verification: Datastore latency below threshold for 15 minutes
